# init(gridPosition:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a graph node with the specified position on a grid.

## Declaration

```swift
init(gridPosition: vector_int2)
```

## Parameters

- **gridPosition**: The position for the node on a discrete integer grid.

## Return Value

A new graph node representing the specified grid position.

## Discussion

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].
